creator: citrin+pr@citrin.ru
text:
Created attachment 181364
Update to 1.049

Update devel/p5-Log-Any to 1.049

Changelog: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Log-Any/Changes

Tested with poudriere testport
portlint: looks fine.

Tested with make test on FreeBSD 11.0/amd64 with perl 5.2[024]

Because Log::Any::Adapter::Syslog was included in Log::Any distribution, port devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog should be deleted (no other ports depend on devel/p5-Log-Any-Adapter-Syslog was found).
